use_cases: Real-time voice chat interfaces displaying multiple speakers with visual indicators
Audio room UIs showing participant avatars in grid layouts
Team collaboration tools with speaking detection visualization
Video conferencing applications with collapsible participant panels
Live audio broadcast interfaces with speaker highlighting
ai_summary: A voice chat interface component that displays multiple participants with avatars and animated speaking indicators. Features a collapsible design with expand/collapse functionality, showing who's actively speaking with visual prominence. Includes participant avatars, speaking state detection UI, and a compact header with controls. Designed for real-time audio communication in collaborative environments.
